# Faktum AI

> Bilingual AI news and analysis site from Finland. This index describes the English edition. Finnish (default): https://www.faktum-ai.com/llms.txt

## Site (English)

- URL: https://www.faktum-ai.com/en/
- Language: English (en)
- Sitemap: https://www.faktum-ai.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Topics: https://www.faktum-ai.com/en/topics/
- Finnish edition: https://www.faktum-ai.com/

## Content types

- /en/news/ — AI news and regulatory updates
- /en/analysis/ — In-depth analysis (markets, infrastructure, business models)
- /en/interviews/ — Interview summaries
- /en/tools/ — Tool reviews for builders

## Editorial line

Journalistic, technical, source-backed. Not hype. Claims and uncertainty are separated. Raw third-party material is rewritten as Faktum AI analysis. Articles share the same slug as the Finnish edition where both exist.

## Contact

- marko@faktum-ai.com
- About: https://www.faktum-ai.com/en/about/
